Title: User Registration Success
Preconditions: User is not registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the register page.
2. User enters valid username, email, and password.
3. User submits the registration form.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Registration Failure - Duplicate Email
Preconditions: User with the same email is already registered.
Test Data: Existing user's email and valid password.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the register page.
2. User enters an existing user's email and valid password.
3. User submits the registration form.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the email is already in use.

Title: User Login Success
Preconditions: User is registered and has valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters registered username/email and correct password.
3. User submits the login form.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User Login Failure - Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User is registered but entered incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters registered username/email and incorrect password.
3. User submits the login form.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Subscribe to Newsletter Success
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the newsletter subscription page.
2. User enters a valid email address.
3. User submits the subscription form.
Expected Result: User is subscribed to the newsletter and receives a confirmation email.

Title: Unsubscribe from Newsletter Success
Preconditions: User is subscribed to the newsletter.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the unsubscribe page.
2. User enters their email address.
3. User clicks on the unsubscribe button.
Expected Result: User is unsubscribed from the newsletter and receives an acknowledgment email.

Title: Event Creation Success
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the event creation page.
2. User fills in all required fields with valid data.
3. User submits the event creation form.
Expected Result: Event is created and displayed in the user's event list.

Title: Event Creation Failure - Missing Required Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the event creation page.
2. User leaves the name field empty and fills other fields.
3. User submits the event creation form.
Expected Result: System displays validation errors for missing required fields.

Title: Join Event Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and event exists.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the event page.
2. User clicks on the join event button.
Expected Result: User is added to the event attendees list and receives a confirmation message.

Title: Join Event Failure - Already Joined
Preconditions: User is logged in and has already joined the event.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the event page.
2. User clicks on the join event button.
Expected Result: System displays a message indicating that the user is already part of the event.

Title: Update Profile Success
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile page.
2. User updates their profile information.
3. User saves the changes.
Expected Result: Profile information is updated and saved successfully.

Title: Update Profile Failure - Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile page.
2. User enters an invalid email format.
3. User saves the changes.
Expected Result: System displays validation errors for the invalid email format.

Title: Logout Success
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the logout page.
2. User clicks on the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Notification Center Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has notifications.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the notification center.
2. User views the notifications.
Expected Result: Notifications are displayed correctly in the notification center.

Title: Flash Activity Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and flash activity is available.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the flash activity page.
2. User participates in the flash activity.
Expected Result: User successfully participates in the flash activity and receives appropriate feedback.

Title: Database Connection Success
Preconditions: Database is up and running.
Test Steps: 1. System attempts to connect to the database.
Expected Result: Database connection is established successfully.

Title: Newsletter Management Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has newsletter management permissions.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
2. User performs newsletter management tasks.
Expected Result: Newsletter management tasks are performed successfully.

Title: Newsletter Management Failure - Unauthorized Access
Preconditions: User is logged in but does not have newsletter management permissions.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
Expected Result: System displays an unauthorized access error message.

Title: Notification Center Failure - No Notifications
Preconditions: User is logged in and has no notifications.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the notification center.
Expected Result: System displays a message indicating there are no notifications.

Title: Flash Activity Failure - Not Available
Preconditions: User is logged in and flash activity is not available.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the flash activity page.
Expected Result: System displays a message indicating that the flash activity is not available.

Title: Database Connection Failure
Preconditions: Database is down.
Test Steps: 1. System attempts to connect to the database.
Expected Result: System displays a database connection failure message.

Title: Newsletter Management Failure - Invalid Input
Preconditions: User is logged in and has newsletter management permissions.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
2. User enters invalid input data.
Expected Result: System displays validation errors for the invalid input data.

Title: Notification Center Failure - Error Loading Notifications
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is an error loading notifications.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the notification center.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating issues loading notifications.

Title: Flash Activity Failure - Server Error
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is a server error.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the flash activity page.
Expected Result: System displays a server error message.

Title: Database Connection Failure - Timeout
Preconditions: Database is up but connection times out.
Test Steps: 1. System attempts to connect to the database.
Expected Result: System displays a timeout error message.

Title: Newsletter Management Failure - Permission Denied
Preconditions: User is logged in and does not have newsletter management permissions.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
Expected Result: System displays a permission denied error message.

Title: Notification Center Failure - Empty List
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an empty notification list.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the notification center.
Expected Result: System displays a message indicating the notification list is empty.

Title: Flash Activity Failure - Network Issue
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is a network issue.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the flash activity page.
Expected Result: System displays a network issue error message.

Title: Database Connection Failure - Authentication Error
Preconditions: Database is up but authentication fails.
Test Steps: 1. System attempts to connect to the database.
Expected Result: System displays an authentication error message.

Title: Newsletter Management Failure - Internal Server Error
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is an internal server error.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
Expected Result: System displays an internal server error message.

Title: Notification Center Failure - Database Error
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is a database error.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the notification center.
Expected Result: System displays a database error message.

Title: Flash Activity Failure - Resource Limit Exceeded
Preconditions: User is logged in and resource limits are exceeded.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the flash activity page.
Expected Result: System displays a resource limit exceeded error message.

Title: Database Connection Failure - Configuration Error
Preconditions: Database configuration is incorrect.
Test Steps: 1. System attempts to connect to the database.
Expected Result: System displays a configuration error message.

Title: Newsletter Management Failure - External API Error
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is an external API error.
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to the newsletter management page.
Expected Result: System displays an external API error message.
